descriptionAr:
رحلة حج استثنائية تبدأ من مكة المكرمة إلى المدينة المنورة مع إثراء الخير

تُقدم إثراء الخير تجربة حج تمزج بين الراحة والسكينة، مع إقامة راقية في فنادق مختارة وخدمات متكاملة تضمن أداء المناسك بكل سهولة ويسر. تبدأ رحلتك المباركة من مكة المكرمة حيث الأجواء الروحانية في أطهر بقاع الأرض والخدمات التي تلبي جميع احتياجاتك أثناء أداء الشعائر، وتُختتم في المدينة المنورة بالقرب من المسجد النبوي الشريف في تجربة إيمانية متكاملة تبقى أثرًا لا يُنسى

توفر الباقة إقامة فندقية مريحة مع وجبات منظمة وفق برنامج الرحلة وخدمات نقل مكيفة ومجدولة بين مواقع المناسك، إضافة إلى التنسيق الكامل لجميع مراحل الرحلة منذ الوصول وحتى المغادرة بما في ذلك خدمات الطيران، مع متابعة ميدانية مستمرة طوال فترة الحج لضمان راحة الحجاج وطمأنينتهم

البداية من مكة المكرمة فندق إثراء العزيزية

تبدأ رحلتك الإيمانية في مكة المكرمة بالإقامة في فندق إثراء العزيزية الذي يتمتع بموقعه القريب من المشاعر المقدسة يوفر الفندق غرفًا عصرية مجهزة بأرقى وسائل الراحة مع خدمات متكاملة تضمن إقامة هادئة ومريحة خلال أيام الحج

ويتميز موقع الفندق بسهولة الوصول إلى الحرم المكي والمشاعر المقدسة مثل منى مزدلفة وعرفات مما يجعل أداء المناسك أكثر يسرًا وراحة ويمنحك فرصة التركيز الكامل على عبادتك

ولإثراء تجربتك يمكنك الاستمتاع بالتسوق في أسواق العزيزية القريبة حيث تجد مجموعة واسعة من المنتجات والهدايا التذكارية التي تخلد هذه الرحلة المباركة

الختام في المدينة المنورة فندق ميسان رحاب المسك  سكينة وراحة بالقرب من المسجد النبوي

تُختتم رحلتك المقدسة في المدينة المنورة بالإقامة في فندق ميسان رحاب المسك الذي يوفر أجواءً من الراحة والسكينة بالقرب من المسجد النبوي الشريف مع سهولة الوصول لأداء الصلوات وزيارة الروضة الشريفة

يتميز الفندق بغرفه المريحة المصممة بعناية لضمان إقامة هادئة، ويقدم خدمات متكاملة تشمل مطاعم تقدم أشهى المأكولات إلى جانب تسهيلات تضمن أعلى مستويات الراحة طوال فترة الإقامة

وبفضل موقعه المتميز يمكنك زيارة أبرز المعالم الروحانية في المدينة والاستمتاع بالتسوق في الأسواق القريبة التي تزخر بالمنتجات الفريدة والهدايا التذكارية المميزة

إثراء الخير إرثٌ يبقى  ورحلةٌ تُحكى

تنويه
قد يختلف تصنيف الفنادق خلال موسم حج 1447-2026 ولن يتم تقديم أي تعويضات في هذه الحالة حيث ستظل الخدمات تقدم وفق المعايير المعروضة في الباقة
descriptionEn:
An Exceptional Hajj Journey from Makkah to Madinah with Ithraa Al Khair

Ithraa Al Khair offers a Hajj experience that blends comfort and tranquility, with refined accommodation in carefully selected hotels and integrated services that ensure the smooth and effortless performance of rituals. Your blessed journey begins in Makkah, where the spiritual atmosphere of the holiest place on earth surrounds you alongside services that meet all your needs during the rituals, and concludes in Madinah, near Al Masjid Al Nabawi, in a complete faith-filled experience that leaves a lasting impression.

The package includes comfortable hotel accommodation, organized meals according to the travel program, and air conditioned, scheduled transportation between the ritual sites. It also features full coordination of all journey stages from arrival to departure, including flight services, with continuous on ground support throughout the Hajj period to ensure pilgrims’ comfort and peace of mind

Beginning in Makkah Ithraa Al Aziziyah Hotel

Your spiritual journey begins in Makkah with accommodation at Ithraa Al Aziziyah Hotel, conveniently located near the holy sites. The hotel offers modern rooms equipped with high  quality amenities, along with integrated services designed to ensure a calm and comfortable stay throughout the days of Hajj

Its location provides easy access to Al Masjid Al Haram and the holy sites of Mina, Muzdalifah, and Arafat, making the performance of rituals more convenient and allowing you to focus fully on worship

To enrich your experience, you may also enjoy shopping in the nearby Al Aziziyah markets, which offer a wide variety of products and souvenirs to commemorate this blessed journey

Conclusion in Madinah Maysan Rahab Al Misk Hotel  Serenity and Comfort Near the Prophet’s Mosque

Your sacred journey concludes in Madinah with a stay at Maysan Rahab Al Misk Hotel, offering an atmosphere of comfort and tranquility near Al Masjid Al Nabawi, with easy access for prayers and visits to Al Rawdah Al Sharifah.

The hotel features comfortable rooms thoughtfully designed to ensure a peaceful stay, along with integrated services that include restaurants serving a variety of delicious meals and facilities that guarantee the highest levels of comfort throughout your stay.

Thanks to its prime location, guests can visit the most prominent spiritual landmarks in the city and enjoy shopping at nearby markets filled with unique products and memorable souvenirs.

Ithraa Al Khair  A Legacy That Endures, A Journey That Tells a Story

Notice
The hotel ratings may vary during 1447-2026 Hajj season. No compensation shall be made in that case as services will still be delivered according to the package description

Your blessed journey begins in Makkah, where the spiritual atmosphere of the holiest place on earth surrounds you alongside services that meet all your needs during the rituals, and concludes in Madinah, near Al Masjid Al Nabawi, in a complete faith-filled experience that leaves a lasting impression. The package includes comfortable hotel accommodation, organized meals according to the travel program, and air conditioned, scheduled transportation between the ritual sites. It also features full coordination of all journey stages from arrival to departure, including flight services, with continuous on ground support throughout the Hajj period to ensure pilgrims’ comfort and peace of mind Beginning in Makkah Ithraa Al Aziziyah Hotel Your spiritual journey begins in Makkah with accommodation at Ithraa Al Aziziyah Hotel, conveniently located near the holy sites. The hotel features comfortable rooms thoughtfully designed to ensure a peaceful stay, along with integrated services that include restaurants serving a variety of delicious meals and facilities that guarantee the highest levels of comfort throughout your stay. Thanks to its prime location, guests can visit the most prominent spiritual landmarks in the city and enjoy shopping at nearby markets filled with unique products and memorable souvenirs. Hotel in Madinah

Maysan Rehab Al Mysk Hotel in Medina offers air-conditioned rooms with private bathrooms, bidets, showers, and TVs. Each room ensures a pleasant stay with modern amenities. Exceptional Service: Guests benefit from a 24-hour front desk staffed with Arabic and English speakers. The hotel provides excellent service support, highly rated by visitors. Prime Location: Located in the city centre, the hotel is 15 km from Prince Mohammad bin Abdulaziz International Airport. Al-Masjid an-Nabawi is an 4-minute walk away, while other attractions are within 11 km.

Cancelation Policy

  • Full Refund - A 100% of the package amount will be refunded except the custom flights if the cancellation is made within 72 hours from the time of booking and no later than 11:59 PM (Makkah Time) on 1 Dhu al-Qi‘dah 2026-04-27, whichever occurs first.

  • Partial Refund - A 100% of the package amount excluding visa fees and the custom flights will be refunded if the cancellation is made after 72 hours from the time of booking, provided it is no later than 11:59 PM (Makkah Time) on 1 Dhu al-Qi‘dah 2026-04-27.

  • No Refund - No refunds will be issued for cancellations made after 11:59 PM (Makkah Time) on 1 Dhu al-Qi'dah (2026-04-27).

  • Flight Booking Amount - The above rules apply to flight bookings arranged by the service provider and do not apply to custom flight bookings made through the airline system, which are subject to the specific cancellation policies of each booking.

  • Important Notes for Refunds - A processing fee of 2.3% (inclusive of VAT) may be deducted when refunding amounts to digital wallets, in accordance with the refund policy stated in the digital wallet.

  • Fees and exchange rate differences - Currency exchange differences may result in variations between the amounts deposited and refunded to digital wallets.
